title: Problem when reusing column name as CASE... WHEN alias in subquery
poc: SELECT CASE WHEN id = 'a' THEN 'x' ELSE 'y' END AS id FROM t;
select * from ( SELECT CASE WHEN id = 'a' THEN 'x' ELSE 'y' END AS othercolnamealias FROM t) as req;
select * from ( SELECT CASE WHEN id = 'a' THEN 'x' ELSE 'y' END AS id FROM t) as req;
key_bug_features: Reusing column name as CASE... WHEN alias in subquery
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT, value VARCHAR(10), status BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE);
SELECT CASE WHEN status THEN 'active' ELSE 'inactive' END AS status FROM test_table;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT CASE WHEN value = 'alpha' THEN 'first' ELSE 'other' END AS value FROM test_table) AS subquery;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT CASE WHEN id = 2 THEN 'second' ELSE 'not second' END AS id FROM test_table) AS req;
